name: snaps-extension
description: snaps browser extension for cookie-based platform authentication

scripts.build: node ../../scripts/clean-path.mjs dist extension.zip && vite build && node ../../scripts/package-extension.mjs .
scripts.dev: node ../../scripts/clean-path.mjs dist && cross-env HOT_RELOAD_EXTENSION_VITE_PORT=4281 NODE_ENV=development dotenv -e ../../.env -- vite build --config vite.config.chrome.ts --mode development --watch
